Item: Are the income beneficiaries and capital beneficiaries potentially a different group of persons?
If a unit trust, detail number of units held by each beneficiary.
Does the deed require an amendment to insert an appropriate definition of income?
Does that deed require an amendment to insert an appropriate Income/Capital characterisation clause?
Does the deed require an amendment to insert an appropriate “income streaming” clause?
If recommending an amendment to the deed, does this trust have separate income and capital beneficiaries? (i.e. resettlement risk)
